nasb.text: The Lord said to Samuel, “Behold, I am about to do a thing in Israel at which both ears of everyone who hears it will tingle.

esv.text: Then the Lord said to Samuel, “Behold, I am about to do a thing in Israel at which the two ears of everyone who hears it will tingle.

cnv.text: 耶和華對撒母耳說：“看哪！我要在以色列中行一件事，聽見的人，都必耳鳴；

ccb.text: 耶和华对撒母耳说：“我要在以色列做一件令人震惊的事。
